etymology.description: phonetic: 戌(戌) (xū, "ninth month") + semantic: 火(火) (huǒ, "fire")
etymology.interpretation: The character 烕 (huǐ) is a phono-semantic compound combining the phonetic element 戌(戌) (xū), which represents the sound, with the semantic element 火(火) (huǒ, "fire") to convey a meaning related to fire. The phonetic component provides the pronunciation, while the addition of the fire radical suggests that the character relates to burning or destruction.
